info.title: 3D Printer Production Simulator
info.description: 3D Printer Production Simulator API — manage inventory, orders, and production cycles.

post.description: Login endpoint - returns JWT access token.
Logout endpoint (session-based, just invalidates client token).

get.description: Get current authenticated user info.
Get full production configuration (models, BOMs, suppliers).
List all product models.

schema.title: Response List Models Api Config Models Get

get.description: Get a specific product model with its full BOM.
List all active suppliers with their product catalogs.

schema.title: Response List Suppliers Api Config Suppliers Get

get.description: Get all inventory levels with warehouse capacity usage.
Get inventory level for a specific product.

post.description: Manually adjust inventory quantity and log the action.

get.description: List all manufacturing orders (newest first).

schema.title: Response List Orders Api Orders Get

post.description: Create a new manufacturing order manually.

get.description: List pending manufacturing orders with BOM requirements.

schema.title: Response List Pending Orders Api Orders Pending Get

get.description: Get order details including BOM breakdown.

post.description: Release an order to production (reserves required materials).
Cancel an order and release any reserved materials.

get.description: List all purchase orders.

schema.title: Response List Purchase Orders Api Purchase Orders Get

post.description: Create a purchase order. Applies bulk discount tiers automatically.

get.description: Get purchase order details.
Get current simulation state (day, date, pending orders, capacity).

post.description: Advance the simulation by one day and return all generated events.

get.description: Get current demand parameters per product model.

post.description: Update demand parameters (mean and variance per model).

get.description: List events with optional filtering and pagination.
Export event log as JSON (up to 10,000 records).
Get details of a specific event.
Export complete game state as JSON (inventory, config, orders, events).

post.description:
Import a complete game state.
WARNING: Replaces all simulation data (users are preserved).

Import a production plan (models, suppliers, initial inventory).
Does NOT clear orders or events — only replaces configuration.

get.description: Root endpoint.
Health check endpoint.
